plugin_desc: Huber+Suhner Cubo Mini optical transmission SNMP child template (enterprise PEN 27894). Beyond standard MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB interface metrics supplied by the shared Transmission SNMP floor, it collects Cubo Mini private fan-card status and calibrated transceiver temperature. Temperature is reported by the device in tenths of degrees Celsius and normalized to Celsius. Fan status values are normalized so ok(3) maps to 1 healthy and every other state maps to 2 fault. CPU, memory and power-supply usage are not exposed as stable shared health objects in CUBO-MINI-MIB, so they are N/A.
name: Transmission

metrics.name: device_temperature_celsius
metrics.description: Highest Cubo Mini transceiver temperature in degrees Celsius, normalized from cubominiXcvrDiagnosticsTemperature tenths-of-Celsius values.

metrics.name: device_fan_state
metrics.description: Worst Cubo Mini fan-card status, normalized from cubominiFanStatus so ok(3) is healthy and every other state is abnormal.
